medals.name: First Friend
medals.description: You made your very first companion on the journey.

medals.name: Fellowship
medals.description: Three friends now travel at your side.

medals.name: Curious Mind
medals.description: You stopped to talk and learn along the way.

medals.name: Creative Hero
medals.description: You told the story your own way, again and again.

medals.name: Pathfinder
medals.description: You chose your own path five times over.

medals.name: Trailblazer
medals.description: A dozen choices shaped your adventure.

medals.name: Generous Heart
medals.description: You gave a gift to a friend in need.
